distutils.extension
Provides the Extension class, used to describe C/C++ extension
modules in setup scripts.
Overridden to support f2py.
	Extensionz
.*\.(cpp|cxx|cc)\Zz!.*\.(f90|f95|f77|for|ftn|f|pyf)\Zc
    Parameters
    ----------
    name : str
        Extension name.
    sources : list of str
        List of source file locations relative to the top directory of
        the package.
    extra_compile_args : list of str
        Extra command line arguments to pass to the compiler.
    extra_f77_compile_args : list of str
        Extra command line arguments to pass to the fortran77 compiler.
    extra_f90_compile_args : list of str
        Extra command line arguments to pass to the fortran90 compiler.
    Nc
include_dirs
define_macros
undef_macros
library_dirs
	libraries
runtime_library_dirs
extra_objects
extra_compile_args
extra_link_args
export_symbolsr
z4swig_opts is specified as a string instead of a list
stacklevel)
old_Extension

sources
	swig_opts

language

extra_f77_compile_args
extra_f90_compile_args)
self
namer

sourcer"
